purpose: Reference catalog for the paid-service value ledger. The helper has a built-in copy; edit this file only if you want to maintain a separate local catalog for planning.
retail_first_principle: Prefer one or two services that repeatedly solve actual validation data gaps across at least 20 runs. Do not buy a feed for one-off curiosity.

services.name: Fiscal.ai
services.likely_use: Best first candidate if reports repeatedly fail on fundamentals, segment/KPI detail, estimates, or transcript review.

services.name: TIKR
services.likely_use: Best first candidate if you want broad retail stock research with affordable terminal-like workflows.

services.name: Koyfin
services.likely_use: Best first candidate if the repeated gap is broad market data, charts, ETFs, macro, or monitoring rather than deep filing extraction.

services.name: Morningstar Investor
services.likely_use: Useful if ETF workflows dominate and holdings/fund comparisons are recurring gaps.

services.name: Seeking Alpha Premium
services.likely_use: Useful if transcript access and event context are frequent blockers; community analysis remains secondary evidence.

services.name: TradingView
services.likely_use: Useful if price-action/technical sections are repeatedly weak, but not enough for source-backed fundamentals.

services.name: Unusual Whales
services.likely_use: Useful only if options flow/positioning gaps repeatedly matter to conclusions.

services.name: Market Chameleon
services.likely_use: Useful if validation repeatedly flags options/skew/earnings-move data gaps.

services.name: Fintel
services.likely_use: Useful if short interest and ownership/13F gaps are recurring.

services.name: ORTEX
services.likely_use: Useful if short/borrow dynamics repeatedly drive the investment debate; likely less broad than a first subscription.

services.name: ImportGenius
services.likely_use: Useful only if tariff and supply-chain exposure repeatedly remain unresolved and are material.
